title: Petrocosmea kingii
intro: Petrocosmea kingii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the King's Petrocosmea or Chinese Pogostemon. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and inflammation, due to its reported antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Petrocosmea kingii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Petrocosmea kingii is often prepared as a decoction or made into capsules, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
